description_long: This object is a realistic crab with a broad, oval-shaped carapace that is mottled with dark brown, tan, and orange hues. The dorsal surface is textured and patterned, with two prominent claws (chelae) that are robust and slightly asymmetrical, and eight segmented walking legs extending outward. The ventral side is lighter in color, with visible segmentation and a smooth, slightly curved abdomen tucked beneath the body. The eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front corners of the carapace, and the mouthparts and antennae are partially visible beneath the frontal edge. The overall appearance suggests a marine crustacean, likely found in coastal or urban seafood markets.
description: A detailed, lifelike crab with a mottled brown and orange carapace, two large claws, and eight segmented legs, featuring textured surfaces and visible eye stalks.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the broad carapace, both claws raised, and all eight legs splayed outward, with eye stalks visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thickness of the body, the curvature of the claws, and the segmentation of the legs and abdomen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the underside of the crab, lighter in color, with the abdomen and leg bases clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the other side of the claws and legs, with the carapace's texture evident.
